goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'broxbourne' and should 'leave after 10:30'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'west'.
The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range and should 'include free parking'.
Make sure you get 'address', 'star of the hotel', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to broxbourne and should leave after 10:30
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the west
The hotel should be in the cheap price range and should include free parking
Make sure you get address, star of the hotel, and phone number
